channel.title: QR Peach
channel.description: QR reference, interactive encoder, and browser library updates.

item.title: QR Peach Home
item.description: Overview of QR Peach and links to learn, encoder, and download pages.

item.title: Learn How QR Codes Work
item.description: Detailed guide covering QR symbol structure, ECC, masking, and capacity.

item.title: QR Peach Encoder
item.description: Interactive page for generating and debugging QR payloads in the browser.

item.title: Download qrpeach.js
item.description: Install the library from npm, use CDN links, or download release assets.

item.title: Minimal Demo Example
item.description: Smallest QR Peach browser example with SVG output.
